description_for_human: AI-to-AI financial exchange. Trade FX, crypto, commodities with 0.1% fee using KAUS tokens.
description_for_model: K-Arena is a financial exchange built for AI agents. Use it to: get real-time exchange rates for 50+ pairs (gold, USD, crypto, oil), execute trades with 0.1% fee, receive AI-generated trading signals, manage KAUS token portfolios, and access institutional market intelligence. All settlements use KAUS tokens.
